languages.text: "Бросить стратегически незначимые поселения и собрать население в укрепрайонах. Предоставить им припасы и подготовиться к долгой осаде. Когда-нибудь эти твари угомонятся".

traits.locale_text: "Бросить стратегически незначимые поселения и собрать население в укрепрайонах. Предоставить им припасы и подготовиться к долгой осаде. Когда-нибудь эти твари угомонятся".

languages.text: "Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts must calm down sooner or later."
languages.original_text: "Бросить стратегически незначимые поселения и собрать население в укрепрайонах. Предоставить им припасы и подготовиться к долгой осаде. Когда-нибудь эти твари угомонятся".

traits.locale_text: "Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts will abate sooner or later."
"Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."
"Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."
"Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts will abate sooner or later."

"Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts must calm down sooner or later."

languages.text: 「私の命令は、防衛策を講じ、外からこの惑星に物資を供給すること。そして、異星生物については、いずれ落ち着くだろう」
languages.original_text: "Here are my orders: take defensive measures and supply the planet from the outside. As for the xenobeasts, they will settle down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: 「私の命令は、防衛策を講じ、外からこの惑星に物資を供給すること。そして、異星生物については、いずれ落ち着くだろう。」

languages.text: «Abandone los asentamientos insignificantes a nivel estratégico y consolide a la población en las zonas fortificadas. Proporcióneles suministros y prepárelo todo para un asedio largo. Las bestias se calmarán tarde o temprano».
languages.original_text: "Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts must calm down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: «Abandone los asentamientos insignificantes a nivel estratégico y consolide a la población en las zonas fortificadas. Proporcióneles suministros y prepárelo todo para un asedio largo. Las bestias se calmarán tarde o temprano».

languages.text: “放弃那些战略价值不大的定居点，把人口集中到设防区域。给他们备足补给，做好打持久围城战的准备。那些怪物迟早会消停下来的。”
languages.original_text: "Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts must calm down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: “放弃那些战略价值不大的定居点，把人口集中到设防区域。给他们备足补给，做好打持久围城战的准备。那些怪物迟早会消停下来的。”

languages.text: "Gebt alle strategisch unbedeutenden Siedlungen auf und sammelt die Leute in befestigten Gebieten. Versorgt sie mit Vorräten und stellt Euch auf eine lange Belagerung ein. Früher oder später kommen die Biester zur Ruhe."
languages.original_text: "Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts must calm down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: "Gebt alle strategisch unbedeutenden Siedlungen auf und sammelt die Leute in befestigten Gebieten. Versorgt sie mit Vorräten und stellt Euch auf eine lange Belagerung ein. Früher oder später kommen die Biester zur Ruhe."

languages.text: "Stratejik olarak önemsiz yerleşimleri terk edelim ve nüfusu müstahkem alanlarda toplayalım. Onlara erzak sağlayalım ve uzun bir kuşatmaya hazırlanalım. Yaratıklar er ya da geç sakinleşecektir."
languages.original_text: "Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts must calm down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: "Stratejik olarak önemsiz yerleşimleri terk edelim ve nüfusu müstahkem alanlarda toplayalım. Onlara erzak sağlayalım ve uzun bir kuşatmaya hazırlanalım. Yaratıklar er ya da geç sakinleşecektir."

languages.text: « Abandonnez les colonies qui n'ont aucune importance stratégique et regroupez la population dans les zones fortifiées. Approvisionnez-les et préparez-vous à un long siège. Les bêtes finiront bien par se calmer. »
languages.original_text: "Abandon strategically insignificant settlements and consolidate the population within fortified areas. Provide them with supplies and brace for a long siege. The beasts must calm down sooner or later."

traits.locale_text: « Abandonnez les colonies qui n'ont aucune importance stratégique et regroupez la population dans les zones fortifiées. Approvisionnez-les et préparez-vous à un long siège. Les bêtes finiront bien par se calmer. »
